_comment: Maps MCP server prefixes to recommended agent profiles for task routing. Used by _15_task_decomposer.py to inject routing hints.

google-chat.hint_reason: Google Chat API requires crawling with many API calls. Break by space — one researcher per space.

forgejo.hint_reason: Forgejo operations involve scanning many issues, repos, or PRs. Break by repository.

github-mcp-server.hint_reason: GitHub operations may involve scanning repos, issues, PRs, or code search across large codebases.

perplexity-ask.hint_reason: Perplexity search is best used by researcher agents who can iteratively refine queries.

tavily-mcp.hint_reason: Tavily search/crawl/extract is designed for research workflows.
